summary: Plan-only inventory classification for five open PRs. No GitHub mutations planned because each PR either lacks required real behavior proof, is draft, has failing required proof/check gates, or is not safely closable under this shard's permissions.

actions.reason: Independent feature PR with a meaningful implementation surface, but it is not mergeable or safely closable in this inventory shard because real behavior proof is missing and no shared canonical was provided.
Draft PR with failed proof and incomplete merge gates. Related closed work exists, but the artifact does not make a boringly safe superseded-close decision.
Focused contributor bug-fix PR with unresolved proof/check blockers and prior author follow-up. It should remain independently tracked rather than closed or merged by this plan-only inventory job.
Independent docs PR with contributor follow-up and unresolved proof requirement. Closeout is not enabled for low-signal PRs and the artifact does not establish supersession.
Independent follow-up bug-fix PR against previously merged timeout compaction behavior. It has a plausible narrow scope but cannot be merge or fixed-by-candidate planned without proof clearance.
